constructors.name: Double
constructors.summary: Creates a new double datatype instance.

params.name: value
params.doc: The value for the double datatype.

methods.name: CompareTo
methods.summary: Compares the current object with another object of the same type.

params.name: other
params.doc: The object to be compared with the current object.

returns.doc: A 32-bit signed integer that indicates the relative order of the objects being compared.The return value has the following meanings:ValueMeaningLess than zeroThe current object is less than the other object.ZeroThe current object is equal to the other object.Greater than zeroThe current object is greater than the other object.

methods.name: Equals(Object)
methods.summary: Returns a value that indicates whether the current instance is equal to the given object.

params.name: Obj
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if the given object has the same value as the current instance.

methods.name: Equals(Double)
methods.summary: Indicates whether the current object is equal to another object of the same type.

params.name: other
params.doc: The object to be compared with the current object.

returns.doc: True if the current object is equal to the other object; otherwise, false.

methods.name: GetHashCode
methods.summary: Returns the hash code for the current instance.

returns.doc: A hash code for the current Double instance.

methods.name: GetSchema
methods.summary: Gets the XML Schema for the datatype.

methods.name: ReadXml
methods.summary: Parses a new value from the given reader.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Returns the string representation of the object.

returns.doc: The string representation of the object.

methods.name: WriteXml
methods.summary: Writes the value as XML to the given writer.

properties.name: Value
properties.summary: The value of the double datatype.
